rows.label: tev041001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Sevvy about Bias history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Sevvy about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Sevvy what he did during the attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Sevvy what he will do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Sevvy about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Our clan was blessed by soil and trees.
We lived as one with life around us.
This is why we became Tree Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0002
rows.name:
But our enemies mined rocks.
Mastered metal. Used gunpowder.
They became Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Our two clans fought for most of Bias
history. But balance was always kept.
Neither could end the other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0004
rows.name:
But then Growth allied with
Cavern Clan. Changed everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0005
rows.name:
They destroyed more than lives and
homes. They destroyed our history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0009
rows.name:
Brave warrior! You saved my son.
I thank you with all that I am.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0010
rows.name:
But I wish another favor. Speak to my
Bias kin. Help them as you helped me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Our people hunt to eat. War with Cavern
Clan to live. It has been this way for
10,000 suns. It is only life we know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Your city is strange to us. Old ways do
not hold. Problems are bound to arise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0013
rows.name:
As chieftain, I try to stop
problems. But I am also new to
this place. I can only do so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0014
rows.name: I need help from someone who knows city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Will you aid us? You will
be rewarded. This I swear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Weapons or no, we were ready to fight
at your side. But Stella talked us out
of it. So we sheltered instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0021
rows.name:
It shamed me to watch you fight alone.
To not repay you for saving my kin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0022
rows.name:
But Stella was right. Bias would
have been destroyed. Children and
future would have been slaughtered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0023
rows.name:
But we will not be burden for Earth aliens.
If we cannot fight, we will work instead.
Please let strength of mighty Bias aid you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0028
rows.name:
Earth alien! You vanquished
Growth! I knew you could do this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0029
rows.name:
Never again will we live
in fear of their yoke.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0030
rows.name:
You ask what I do next? I
never dared consider it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0031
rows.name:
But others of our kin might still
not be free. They may be held by
Growth's masters. Held by Samaar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG0032
rows.name:
I hope you help me free
them if that day comes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG1001
rows.name:
My son is gone, brave warrior. Yet
his friends live still. I thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG1002
rows.name:
But I wish another favor. Speak to my
Bias kin. Help them as you helped me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG1003
rows.name:
Our people hunt to eat. War with Cavern
Clan to live. It has been this way for
10,000 suns. It is only life we know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG1004
rows.name:
Your city is strange to us. Old ways do
not hold. Problems are bound to arise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG1005
rows.name:
As chieftain, I try to stop
problems. But I am also new to
this place. I can only do so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG1006
rows.name: I need help from someone who knows city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041001_MSG1007
rows.name:
Will you aid us? I do not wish
my son's fate on any more Bias.[ST:wait ]
